system.requirement: Your wyvern won’t devour you. For now.

abilities.description: Insatiable: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} and score a hit, you may @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) in exchange for +2 momentum.
Indomitable: When you make the @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d34cdf2408cd22b6]{Companion Takes a Hit} move for your wyvern, add +2 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
Savage: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by commanding your wyvern to attack, roll +heart. On a hit, mark progress.
